title: VistaQuality
description: An addon for Vista that adds dynamic control over how strong the CRT effect is. Just add redstone!
body:
A simple addon for the Vista mod. It is inspired by Create Mod mechanics based around redstone strength changing behavior. This mod increases the CRT filter on the Vista televisions at lower redstone strengths and decreases it at higher restone strengths.

Redstone strength of 1:
![Redstone strength of 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b551534d659219b256535d3e20dedcabe003af5e.png)

Redstone strength of 15:
![Redstone strength of 15](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51795df3d9357c814c6191940ab05d8ec29ceaea_0.webp)
